summary: Financial Management System Testing Complete - All 16 backend API tests passed, all frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality

minor.issue: Returns 520 status code instead of 404 for non-existent user (proxy issue, error message is correct)
Returns 520 status code instead of 400 for validation errors (proxy issue, error message is correct)

issues: Console warning: 'Received NaN for the value attribute' when clearing input fields - minor UX issue

critical_code_review_comments: User Ledger API correctly enriches transactions with user name/email
Redeem Settings API properly validates required fields
P&L Monthly report correctly calculates income, expenses, and profit margins
Reconciliation API properly compares actual vs expected wallet balances
All MongoDB _id fields are properly excluded from responses
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing transaction data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial Management System fully tested. Test file /app/tests/test_financial_management.py covers: 1) User Ledger API with filters and pagination, 2) Redeem Settings GET/PUT with validation, 3) Monthly P&L reports and snapshots, 4) Wallet reconciliation status and manual run. Frontend pages AdminUserLedger.js and AdminRedeemSettings.js both load correctly with all features working.
